inputs.label: Compression Ratio (r)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of cylinder volume at BDC to TDC. Typical diesel: 12-24.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of cylinder volume at BDC to TDC. Typical diesel: 12-24.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Silindir hacminin ÜÖN'deki hacme oranı. Tipik dizel: 12-24.

inputs.label: Cutoff Ratio (rc)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of volume after combustion to clearance volume. Typical: 1.5-3.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of volume after combustion to clearance volume. Typical: 1.5-3.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yanma sonrası hacmin boşluk hacmine oranı. Tipik: 1.5-3.

inputs.label: Initial Temperature (T1)
inputs.businessContext: Temperature at start of compression (state 1). Standard ambient: 300 K.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature at start of compression (state 1). Standard ambient: 300 K.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıkıştırma başlangıcındaki sıcaklık (durum 1). Standart ortam: 300 K.

inputs.label: Initial Pressure (p1)
inputs.businessContext: Pressure at start of compression (state 1). Atmospheric: 101325 Pa.

businessContext_i18n.en: Pressure at start of compression (state 1). Atmospheric: 101325 Pa.

inputs.label: Specific Heat Ratio (k)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio cp/cv for air. Typically 1.4 for diatomic gases.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio cp/cv for air. Typically 1.4 for diatomic gases.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hava için cp/cv oranı. Tipik olarak 1.4 (diatomik gazlar).

inputs.label: Specific Heat (cv)
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat at constant volume for air. Standard: 718 J/(kg·K).

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific heat at constant volume for air. Standard: 718 J/(kg·K).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hava için sabit hacimde özgül ısı. Standart: 718 J/(kg·K).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
